def setUp(self) -> None:
        self.saved_env = {
            name: os.environ.pop(name, None)
            for name in (
                "MORENO_REPO_ROOT",
                "MORENO_OPERATOR_POLICY",
                "MORENO_OLLAMA_BASE_URL",
                "MORENO_OLLAMA_PRIMARY_MODEL",
                "MORENO_OLLAMA_FALLBACK_MODEL",
            )
        }
        self.temp = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="moreno-v253-")
        self.root = Path(self.temp.name)
        self.repo = self.root / "repo"
        self.repo.mkdir()
        subprocess.run(["git", "init", "-q", "-b", "main"], cwd=self.repo, check=True)
        subprocess.run(["git", "config", "user.name", "Test"], cwd=self.repo, check=True)
        subprocess.run(
            ["git", "config", "user.email", "test@example.invalid"],
            cwd=self.repo,
            check=True,
        )
        self._write("docs/spec.md", "Generate the two requested files.\n")
        self._write(
            "memory/phase-controller/controller.json",
            json.dumps(
                {
                    "enabled": True,
                    "status": "blocked",
                    "current_job_id": "phase-test-001",
                    "next_phase_id": "phase-test",
                    "next_phase_index": 0,
                },
                indent=2,
            )
            + "\n",
        )
        self._write(
            "memory/phase-controller/jobs/phase-test-001/status.json",
            json.dumps(
                {
                    "job_id": "phase-test-001",
                    "phase_id": "phase-test",
                    "status": "blocked",
                    "current_step": "blocked pending candidate",
                    "artifacts": [],
                    "approval_id": None,
                    "error": None,
                },
                indent=2,
            )
            + "\n",
        )
        subprocess.run(["git", "add", "."], cwd=self.repo, check=True)
        subprocess.run(["git", "commit", "-q", "-m", "fixture"], cwd=self.repo, check=True)

        StreamingOllamaHandler.requested_models = []
        StreamingOllamaHandler.mode = "success"
        self.server = ThreadingHTTPServer(("127.0.0.1", 0), StreamingOllamaHandler)
        self.thread = threading.Thread(target=self.server.serve_forever, daemon=True)
        self.thread.start()
        port = self.server.server_address[1]
        self.policy = self.root / "policy.json"
        self.policy.write_text(
            json.dumps(
                {
                    "ollama": {
                        "base_url": f"http://127.0.0.1:{port}",
                        "primary_model": PRIMARY,
                        "fallback_model": FALLBACK,
                        "forbidden_models": ["qwen3.5:9b"],
                    },
                    "limits": {
                        "model_timeout_seconds": 30,
                        "max_model_attempts": 3,
                    },
                    "cloud_memory_review": {"enabled": False},
                },
                indent=2,
            ),
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        self.executor = GovernedExecutor(self.repo, self.policy)
        self.base_request = {
            "job_id": "phase-test-001",
            "objective": "Generate a small tested module.",
            "context_paths": ["docs/spec.md"],
            "target_paths": ["runtime/generated.py", "tests/test_generated.py"],
            "acceptance_checks": ["Python compiles", "isolated tests pass"],
            "timeout_seconds": 30,
        }
